examples: Martin Luther King tried to break down racial discrimination

meanings.definition: make a mathematical, chemical, or grammatical analysis of; break down into components or essential features

examples: When she heard that she had not passed the exam, she lost it completely
When her baby died, she snapped
The car died on the road
The bus we travelled in broke down on the way to town
The engine failed on the way to town
her eyesight went after the accident
the building crumbled after the explosion

meanings.definition: separate (substances) into constituent elements or parts
collapse due to fatigue, an illness, or a sudden attack
